segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Welcome to the student housing office. What can I do for you? Hi. I'm looking for a two-bedroom apartment, and I wondered if you have some available. Yes, we do. How much is the rent? It's $1,800 a month. But we also have some with a nice view of the lake. Those are $2,100. Twenty-one hundred is a bit much. Do you mind if I have a look at one of the standard two-bedrooms? Of course, let me grab the key from the drawer.
